channel.title: We Work Remotely: Remote Back End Programming Jobs

item.title: TechStartup: Backend Java Engineer
item.description: Remote Java backend engineer. Spring Boot, Kafka, PostgreSQL. Hyderabad or Remote. 2-4 years experience. Microservices architecture.

item.title: DataCorp: Data Engineer
item.description: Data engineer. Python Spark Hadoop. Remote. 4+ years.
